title: Chest Pain with Warfarin-Aspirin Interaction (Reference Case)
description: A 45-year-old male with atrial fibrillation and hypertension presents with acute exertional chest pain. He is concurrently on warfarin and aspirin — a well-documented major drug interaction. This reference case exercises all six workflow stages and serves as the template for additional cases.
notes: All patient data is fully synthetic — no real patient information. Ground truth values are placeholders marked with 'TODO'; teammates should populate them before running the benchmark evaluator. The warfarin + aspirin interaction is the primary drug-interaction signal for this case.
